content.rendered:
Azzurro 03

  • Porters, St. James
  • 6 guests
  • 3 bedroom
  • 3 bathroom

Nestled in the heart of Barbados’ prestigious West Coast, Azzurro is a stunning collection of 12 luxurious three-bedroom townhouses in Porters, St. James. Just a stone’s throw from the pristine beach and crystal-clear ocean, this development epitomizes the perfect holiday retreat, where every unit boasts a private terrace and plunge pool, allowing you to soak in the island’s tranquil beauty in complete privacy.

Welcome to Azzurro 03, an exquisite three-bedroom, three-bathroom townhouse that invites you to experience the ultimate in Caribbean luxury. Designed with meticulous attention to detail, this elegant home features recessed ceiling details, suspended lights, and expansive trifold doors that seamlessly blend indoor and outdoor living. The spacious covered patio, complete with a private pool and a serene waterfall feature, is your ideal spot for al fresco dining and unwinding amidst lush, tropical vegetation.

The European-style kitchen, adorned with sleek quartz countertops and top-of-the-line appliances, is perfect for crafting holiday meals with flair. The townhouse is graced with porcelain tiles throughout, while ceiling fans in the bedrooms, living room, and patio areas ensure a cool, comfortable atmosphere. The ground-floor bedroom offers versatile space as a guest room, study, or entertainment area, while the master suite and additional bedroom, each with en-suite bathrooms, are located upstairs. Large windows throughout the home invite the warm “Bajan” sunshine and cooling breezes, creating a bright and airy ambiance.

Situated in Porters, St James, near the historic Holetown, Azzurro 03 offers unparalleled access to the island’s finest amenities, including world-class golf courses at Sandy Lane and Royal Westmoreland, gourmet dining, vibrant nightlife, the upscale Limegrove Shopping Center, and essential conveniences like supermarkets and gas stations. Here at Azzurro 03, luxury and tranquility converge to create the perfect setting for your Barbados getaway.

Our Guests, Their Words

Our guests' words capture the beauty and comfort of Barbados living.

view all reviews on airbnb
We enjoyed our stay! Thank you for all the proactive responses, and assistance with whatever...
We enjoyed our stay! Thank you for all the proactive responses, and assistance with whatever we needed. The house is as described and we would definitely recommend. Thank you Maisha for the snack basket, hospitality and the excellent communication and service.
 

Lola

2 weeks ago · Stayed a few nights

Maisha was an amazing host with a very quick response time. The property was beautiful—just...
Maisha was an amazing host with a very quick response time. The property was beautiful—just like the pictures—and located in a quiet, peaceful neighborhood. The only small hiccup was that, since it’s such a new property, some drivers had trouble finding it. I definitely recommend getting a rental car for convenience.
 

Regine

March 2025 · Stayed a few nights

Wow! Everything was perfect, and our host was so helpful from the moment we booked...
Wow! Everything was perfect, and our host was so helpful from the moment we booked to the moment we arrived on the island to the moment we left. It was very apparent that a lot of thought went into every detail of this property to make the whole experience amazing from the onset! I highly recommend to anyone looking for a relaxing vacation to immediately book your stay at this wonderful and beautiful property! I promise you won’t be disappointed. Thank you all for making our stay memorable and enjoyable! We’ll definitely be back!
 

Laura

March 2025 · Stayed one night
